message:
feat(frankenterm-web): add unified resize signal arbiter with coalescing (bd-2vr05.15.1.2)

Implement ResizeArbiter that serializes and coalesces heterogeneous resize
signals (ResizeObserver, visualViewport, orientation, DPR, zoom, direct grid)
into a single deterministic geometry computation per frame. Follows existing
WheelCoalescer pattern. Last-writer-wins for overlapping fields with explicit
supersession rules. 37 unit tests covering all signal types and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
